Imports

noise/basic, noise/wcwidth, noise/wtf8, noise/styler, noise/prompt, noise/posixio, noise/history, noise/killring

Types

CompletionHook = proc (self: var Noise; text: string): int
KeyType = enum
  ktNone, ktCtrlC, ktCtrlD, ktCtrlX, ktEsc
Noise = object
  when promptHistory:
  when promptKill:
  when promptCompletion:
  when promptPreloadBuffer:

Consts

promptBasic = true
promptCompletion = true
promptEmacsWordEditing = false
promptHistory = true
promptIncrementalHistorySearch = true
promptKill = true
promptPreloadBuffer = true
promptPrimitives = false
promptWordEditing = true

Procs

proc addCompletion(self: var Noise; text: string) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc getKeyType(self: Noise): KeyType {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc getLine(self: var Noise): string {....raises: [IOError, EOFError],
                                        tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc getPrompt(self: var Noise): Styler {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc historyAdd(self: var Noise; line: string) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc historyClear(self: var Noise) {....raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc historyLoad(self: var Noise; fileName: string): bool {....raises: [IOError],
    tags: [ReadIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc historySave(self: var Noise; fileName: string): bool {....raises: [IOError],
    tags: [WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
proc historySetMaxLen(self: var Noise; len: int) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc init(x: typedesc[Noise]): Noise
proc killSetMaxLen(self: var Noise; len: int) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc preloadBuffer(self: var Noise; preloadText: string) {....raises: [ValueError],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc readLine(self: var Noise): bool {....raises: [IOError, EOFError, Exception], tags: [
    WriteIOEffect, RootEffect, ReadIOEffect, ReadEnvEffect], forbids: [].}
proc setCompletionHook(self: var Noise; prc: CompletionHook) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc setPrompt(self: var Noise; text: string) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
proc setPrompt(self: var Noise; text: Styler) {....raises: [], tags: [],
    forbids: [].}
